$comment: Schema for exported tree-ensemble models. The TS inference adapter evaluates this directly — no ONNX runtime needed.

node_format.split_node: { f: feature_index, t: threshold, l: left_child_index, r: right_child_index }
node_format.evaluation: start at node 0; if feature[f] <= t go to nodes[l] else nodes[r]; stop at leaf; sum leaf values across trees; apply sigmoid for classification
